description: Use nanobot from Discord servers and DMs.

setup.tryIt: Mention the bot in a server or send it a direct message.
setup.summary: Enable turns on Discord support. Discord still needs a bot token and server permissions.
steps: Create a bot in Discord Developer Portal and copy its token.
Invite the bot to your server with message read/send and slash command permissions.
Save and enable Discord, then mention the bot or send a direct message.

token.label: Bot token
token.help: Create it from the Bot page in Discord Developer Portal.

allowChannels.label: Allowed channels
allowChannels.help: Leave empty to allow any channel the bot can read.
